title: After Surging 50% in Past Month, CleanSpark Inc (CLSK) Stock Rises More?
text: CleanSpark Inc (NASDAQ: CLSK) has experienced significant momentum, with the stock rising more than 50% over the past month and trading near $14. The company mined 640 Bitcoin in April 2026, averaging 21.33 daily. Year-to-date through April, CleanSpark has produced 2,439 Bitcoin while maintaining holdings of approximately 13,453 Bitcoin. Needham increased its price target to $18 from $17, maintaining a Buy rating. The firm expressed increased confidence in CleanSpark securing lease agreements for its data centers after meeting with management. CleanSpark operates as a Nevada-based digital infrastructure developer, specializing in high-efficiency data centers for AI workloads, high-performance computing, and cryptocurrency mining operations. While acknowledging CLSK's potential, the article suggests certain AI stocks may present greater upside potential with lower downside risk for investors seeking alternative opportunities.
